creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sergio Carlavilla Delgado from comment #1)

Will <https://docs-archive.freebsd.org/> be the location for the foreseeable future? 

I was not previously aware of a change, today I found <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/615799b24a276417970b44678548250d033a5b8a> but I don't know what preceded that.
